title: Blue Canyon Natural Cork Bath Mats, Eco-Friendly Durable Wooden Non-slip Bathroom Accessory, Moisture Resistant & Anti-Microbial Bath Corkboard - 12 mm Thickness,46 x 62 cm
features: 【 DURABLE & MOISTURE RESISTANT 】: The Blue Canyon cork bathmat is a must-have accessory to your bathroom. Our bathroom mat is produced with high-quality, environment-friendly cork, making them reliable and durable. It’s resistant to moisture, enabling it to age without deterioration, which makes it long-lasting.

【 NATURAL & ECO-FRIENDLY 】: Cork is a biodegradable material, 100% natural & environment friendly as it is recyclable, unlike other bathmats that pose harm to nature. Our cork eco-friendly bath mat is one little step towards a sustainable life.

【 NON-SLIP SAFETY 】: Don’t worry about being fractured from dangerous slips and slides while getting out of your bathroom. Cork material is known for its absorbent and anti-slip properties; it protects slippery bathroom floors and tiles from stagnant puddles and dries faster. Our high-performance Bath rug mat stays where you place it & eliminating the need for constant readjustments and keeping your loved ones from falling.

【 HYGIENIC & ANTI MICROBIAL 】: Our Blue Canyon cork rug pad is highly water resistant & hence preventing mould formation & that’s how it checks bathroom hygiene. It’s also hypoallergenic as cork does not absorb dust like other bathmats & helps protect against allergies.

【 COMFORTABLE & WARM 】: The natural texture of cork combines softness & flexibility to the touch with a naturally uneven surface & gradually warms up your feet. Looks beautiful & feels great. Experience a relaxing place to step on after your refreshing shower with our Blue Canyon bath cork.
description: Product Description A FULLY MANAGED SUPPLY CHAIN OF HOUSEHOLD RANGES Our home and bathroom accessory ranges are constantly changing to meet and adapt to design trends in; bathroom textiles, bathroom accessories, laundry and storage – providing a full homeware range to our clients. An introduction to Blue Canyon... Luxury By Design Blue Canyon are at the forefront of Bathroom Accessory and Homeware manufacturing and distribution. Having built an enviable supply chain of proven providers during the course of 30 years’ experience in the bathroom accessory industries, Blue Canyon have a global reach in manufacturing that ensures the smoothest of operations and supply. Bathroom Mats Fabric Mats Blue Canyon have an extensive range of bathroom mats in varying colours to suit your bathroom whatever the style. Colours include (but are not limited too) blue, grey, pink, orange, yellow and cream. All bath mats are cotton or polyester and are available as a single mat or as a set for the bath and the basin. Plastic Mats Blue Canyons plastic mats are the perfect solution for slippery surfaces. In various colours and styles the plastic or rubber matting are ideal for a shower or bathroom, also available with suction pads to avoid slipping. Cork Mats Cork is the most natural bath mat option, available in different thicknesses and shapes. The perfect bathroom mat option. Visit Our Brand Store To view the full range of blue canyon products please scroll to the top of the page and click on the visit brand store; you can be sure to find quality stylish items at affordable prices.
